reforms.description: The government plans to enhance cooperation between counties and labor market authorities to improve skills alignment with market needs, alongside making student loans more accessible for short courses. A White Paper detailing policy steps to upgrade skills for a productive economy and the green transition was presented, outlining the government's commitment to improving education and training.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving skills alignment and accessibility is expected to enhance workforce productivity and adaptability, supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been officially announced but are not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms represent significant steps towards improving education and training but do not constitute a major overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: In 2023 a White Paper detailed a set of policy steps to upgrade skills for a productive economy, the green transition and high-quality welfare services.

reforms.description: The Norwegian government plans to establish a health technology scheme as part of its 2024-27 Health and Coordination Plan, aimed at enhancing digital collaboration in healthcare.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing digital collaboration in healthcare is expected to improve health outcomes and efficiency, contributing to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but is not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a health technology scheme represents a major reform in the healthcare sector.
reforms.source_quote: The government will support local responsibility for digitalisation through the establishment of a health technology scheme.
